descriptions.text: Pokémon Too Many Types is a rom hack of Pokémon Emerald that was originally created for content creator Alpharad. This hack adds multiple new types into the game bringing the total to 62 types as well as 118 new moves. Preexisting moves and Pokémon have their types altered to accommodate for the additional types and also allows Pokémon to have three types (at most) at a time instead of two.
